title: November 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 22''' is the 326th day (327th on leap years) of the year. There are 39 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Roy Thomas]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Paul Brooke]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Mads Mikkelsen]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Michael Kenneth Williams]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Torstein Nordstrand]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 42|''Star Wars Weekly'' 42]] published.
*[[1979]] – [[Leeanna Walsman]] is born.
*[[1986]] – "[[Just My Luck]]" and "[[Bringing Up Norky]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[1989]] – [[Alden Ehrenreich]] is born.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 24|''Star Wars'' (1998) 24]] published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 10|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 10]] published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[The Best of Star Wars Insider Volume 4]]'' published.
*2016 – [[Peter Sumner]] dies.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 39|''Star Wars'' (2015) 39]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 38|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 38]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Chapter 3: The Sin]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2022]] – ''[[The High Republic: Convergence]]'' published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic: Convergence (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Convergence'' audiobook]] released.
*2022 – [[The High Republic: Quest for the Hidden City (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Quest for the Hidden City'' audiobook]] released.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Secrets of the Bounty Hunters]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Han Solo & Chewbacca Vol. 1 — The Crystal Run Part One]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Bounty Hunters 40|''Bounty Hunters'' 40]] published.
*2023 – [[Dark Droids: D-Squad 3|''Dark Droids: D-Squad'' 3]] published.
*2023 – [[Hyperspace Stories 11|''Hyperspace Stories'' 11]] published.
